chapters.title: SCOR Model
chapters.transcript: Plan, Source, Make, Deliver, Return. Supply chain metrics: cash-to-cash cycle, inventory turns.

chapters.title: Inventory Management
chapters.transcript: EOQ, safety stock, reorder point. Newsvendor model. ABC analysis.

chapters.title: Forecasting Demand
chapters.transcript: Time series: exponential smoothing, ARIMA. Forecast error (MSE, MAPE). Bullwhip effect.

chapters.title: Network Design
chapters.transcript: Facility location models (p-median, covering). Transportation modes. Cross-docking.

chapters.title: Risk and Resilience
chapters.transcript: Risk assessment, disruption scenarios. Dual sourcing, postponement. COVID-19 lessons.
